name: Atlas Credit Card

domestic: Airport lounge access is tiered based on spending:
Silver tier (entry-level / <3L spend): 8 domestic / 4 international lounge visits per anniversary year.
Gold tier (7.5L spend): 12 domestic / 6 international lounge visits per anniversary year.
Platinum tier (15L spend): 18 domestic / 12 international lounge visits per anniversary year.
international: Airport lounge access is tiered based on spending:
Silver tier (entry-level / <3L spend): 8 domestic / 4 international lounge visits per anniversary year.
Gold tier (7.5L spend): 12 domestic / 6 international lounge visits per anniversary year.
Platinum tier (15L spend): 18 domestic / 12 international lounge visits per anniversary year.

specialSpendRules.notes: Education payments can earn Atlas rewards subject to current Axis terms

milestones.label: 2,500 EDGE Miles on annual spend of ₹3 lakh.
Additional 2,500 EDGE Miles on annual spend of ₹7.5 lakh.
Additional 5,000 EDGE Miles on annual spend of ₹15 lakh.

milestoneBenefits: 2,500 EDGE Miles on annual spend of ₹3 lakh.
Additional 2,500 EDGE Miles on annual spend of ₹7.5 lakh.
Additional 5,000 EDGE Miles on annual spend of ₹15 lakh.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 2,500 EDGE Miles upon completing the first transaction within 37 days of card issuance.

joiningBenefits: 2,500 EDGE Miles upon completing the first transaction within 37 days of card issuance.
renewalBenefits: Renewal benefits are tiered based on status:
Silver tier: 0 EDGE Miles upon payment of annual fee.
Gold tier: 2,500 EDGE Miles upon payment of annual fee.
Platinum tier: 5,000 EDGE Miles upon payment of annual fee.
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions from ₹400 to ₹4,000 (capped at ₹400 per billing cycle)
Dining Delights discounts at participating restaurants
additionalDetails: EDGE Miles can be redeemed for travel bookings at Travel EDGE portal or transferred to airline/hotel partners.
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-02
EDGE Miles are valid for 3 years from the date of earning.
Miles may expire if the loyalty account remains inactive (no earn, redeem, or login) for 365 consecutive days.

Annual transfer caps per customer ID reset every calendar year: Group A (international partners) capped at 30,000 EDGE Miles; Group B capped at 120,000 EDGE Miles. Combined limit of 150,000 EDGE Miles.

Travel transfer partners: Accor, Marriott Bonvoy, and Qatar Airways were removed as transfer partners in April 2026. Standard legacy partners transfer at a 1:2 ratio. Newly added partners (British Airways, Finnair, Vietnam Airlines) transfer at a 2:1 ratio.
Airport lounge access is tiered based on spending:
Silver tier (entry-level / <3L spend): 8 domestic / 4 international lounge visits per anniversary year.
Gold tier (7.5L spend): 12 domestic / 6 international lounge visits per anniversary year.
Platinum tier (15L spend): 18 domestic / 12 international lounge visits per anniversary year.
Gold, rent, wallet load, government, insurance, fuel, utilities, and telecom transactions are completely excluded from earning rewards and tier/milestone spend calculations.
